---
title: "LSA Directory"
toc: false
---

Sequential organization of Learning Sequence Activities (LSAs) from the Jump Right In
tonal and rhythm registers, by unit, skill, and content/context. Unit/skill/content
source: `LSA-TOC.pdf`. Criteria are parsed live from the pattern libraries at
`apps/patterns/pattern-object.js` and `apps/rhythms/rhythm-pattern-object.js` — a key
like `t1-1A1` is Tonal Register Book 1, Unit 1, Section A, Criterion 1.

Click a criterion chip (e.g. `A1`) to open that criterion in the evaluation chart.
Units with no chips haven't been digitized into the pattern library yet.

```{=html}
<style>
#lsa-dir table { margin-bottom: 2.5rem; }
#lsa-dir th {
  color: var(--parch-dim);
  font-weight: 600;
  border-top: 2px solid var(--parch-edge);
}
#lsa-dir td, #lsa-dir th { vertical-align: top; }
#lsa-dir td.lsa-unit, #lsa-dir th.lsa-unit { text-align: center; white-space: nowrap; }
#lsa-dir td.lsa-criteria { min-width: 14rem; }
#lsa-dir .lsa-chips { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: .3rem; }
#lsa-dir a.lsa-link {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-decoration: none;
  padding: .1rem .4rem;
  border-radius: .3rem;
  border: 1px solid var(--site-border);
  color: var(--bs-link-color, #0969DA);
  white-space: nowrap;
}
#lsa-dir a.lsa-link:hover { background: var(--site-surface-2); text-decoration: underline; }
#lsa-dir span.lsa-nolink {
  display: inline-block;
  color: var(--site-ink-3);
  font-size: .82rem;
}
#lsa-dir h2 { margin-top: 0; }
#lsa-dir .lsa-book-note { color: var(--site-ink-2); font-size: .88rem; margin: -.5rem 0 1rem; }
</style>

<div id="lsa-dir">
  <h2>Tonal Register</h2>
  <div id="lsa-tonal-1"></div>
  <div id="lsa-tonal-2"></div>

  <h2>Rhythm Register</h2>
  <div id="lsa-rhythm-1"></div>
  <div id="lsa-rhythm-2"></div>
</div>

<script src="/apps/patterns/pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/rhythms/rhythm-pattern-object.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/toc.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/curriculum.js"></script>
<script src="/apps/lsa/instructions.js"></script>
<script>
(function () {
  // Unit/skill/content rows now live in apps/lsa/toc.js (single source of truth,
  // also consumed by curriculum.js to attach a skill code to every criterion).
  const TONAL_1 = LSA_TOC.TONAL_1;
  const TONAL_2 = LSA_TOC.TONAL_2;
  const RHYTHM_1 = LSA_TOC.RHYTHM_1;
  const RHYTHM_2 = LSA_TOC.RHYTHM_2;

  // ── link helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  function lsaLink(register, key) {
    return "/teacher/lsa-chart.html?register=" + register + "&criterion=" + encodeURIComponent(key);
  }

  // All parsed criteria (curriculum.js) belonging to one register/book/unit,
  // sorted Section A before B before C, criterion 1 before 2 before 3.
  function criteriaForUnit(register, book, unit) {
    const all = window.LSA_CRITERIA || [];
    return all
      .filter(function (c) { return c.register === register && c.book === book && c.unit === unit; })
      .sort(function (a, b) {
        return a.section.localeCompare(b.section) || a.criterion - b.criterion;
      });
  }

  function renderTable(mountId, rows, register, book) {
    const mount = document.getElementById(mountId);
    const table = document.createElement("table");
    table.className = "table table-sm table-hover";
    table.innerHTML =
      '<thead><tr>' +
      '<th class="lsa-unit">Unit</th><th>Skill</th><th>Content / Context</th><th class="lsa-criteria">Criteria</th>' +
      '</tr></thead>';
    const tbody = document.createElement("tbody");
    for (const [unit, skill, content] of rows) {
      const tr = document.createElement("tr");

      const tdUnit = document.createElement("td");
      tdUnit.className = "lsa-unit";
      tdUnit.textContent = String(unit);
      tr.appendChild(tdUnit);

      const tdSkill = document.createElement("td");
      tdSkill.textContent = skill;
      tr.appendChild(tdSkill);

      const tdContent = document.createElement("td");
      tdContent.textContent = content;
      tr.appendChild(tdContent);

      const tdCrit = document.createElement("td");
      tdCrit.className = "lsa-criteria";
      const criteria = criteriaForUnit(register, book, unit);
      if (criteria.length) {
        const chips = document.createElement("div");
        chips.className = "lsa-chips";
        criteria.forEach(function (c) {
          const a = document.createElement("a");
          a.className = "lsa-link";
          a.href = lsaLink(register, c.familyKey);
          a.textContent = c.section + String(c.criterion);
          const instructions = typeof LSA_INSTRUCTIONS !== "undefined" ? LSA_INSTRUCTIONS : {};
          const instruction = instructions[c.familyKey];
          const countText = c.patternCount + " pattern" + (c.patternCount === 1 ? "" : "s") +
            " (E:" + c.levels.E + " M:" + c.levels.M + " D:" + c.levels.D + ")";
          a.title = instruction ? c.label + " — " + instruction + " — " + countText
            : c.label + " — " + countText;
          chips.appendChild(a);
        });
        tdCrit.appendChild(chips);
      } else {
        const span = document.createElement("span");
        span.className = "lsa-nolink";
        span.textContent = "not yet digitized";
        tdCrit.appendChild(span);
      }
      tr.appendChild(tdCrit);

      tbody.appendChild(tr);
    }
    table.appendChild(tbody);
    mount.appendChild(table);
  }

  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function () {
    const t1Note = document.createElement("p");
    t1Note.className = "lsa-book-note";
    t1Note.textContent = "Tonal Register Book 1 (units 1–21)";
    document.getElementById("lsa-tonal-1").appendChild(t1Note);
    renderTable("lsa-tonal-1", TONAL_1, "tonal", 1);

    const t2Note = document.createElement("p");
    t2Note.className = "lsa-book-note";
    t2Note.textContent = "Tonal Register Book 2 (units 22–42)";
    document.getElementById("lsa-tonal-2").appendChild(t2Note);
    renderTable("lsa-tonal-2", TONAL_2, "tonal", 2);

    const r1Note = document.createElement("p");
    r1Note.className = "lsa-book-note";
    r1Note.textContent = "Rhythm Register Book 1 (units 1–19)";
    document.getElementById("lsa-rhythm-1").appendChild(r1Note);
    renderTable("lsa-rhythm-1", RHYTHM_1, "rhythm", 1);

    const r2Note = document.createElement("p");
    r2Note.className = "lsa-book-note";
    r2Note.textContent = "Rhythm Register Book 2 (units 20–42)";
    document.getElementById("lsa-rhythm-2").appendChild(r2Note);
    renderTable("lsa-rhythm-2", RHYTHM_2, "rhythm", 2);
  });
})();
</script>
```
